creator: wjw@digiware.nl
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #29)

Just this morning one the the core developers for Ceph started the dicussion of EOL-ing all stuff that depends on 2.7, and only work on using 3.x. Because 2.7 is EOL in 2020....
So I'm expecting even more fallout.

Question what is going to be needed to keep FreeBSD packages happy. But I guess I'll find out in due time.
